variants.title: Donaldson P563296 Pressure Gauge
variants.description: Genuine Donaldson P563296 Pressure Gauge is designed to provide reliable performance in pressure gauge applications. Built with high-quality materials, it ensures consistent functionality and durability. Ideal for industrial, automotive, or heavy-duty environments, this component enhances system performance and longevity.
specifications: Style: Pressure Gauge, Outer Diameter: 53.3 mm
